title: Palliative and end of life care profiles: January 2025 update
body: "The update for January 2025 has been published by the Office for Health Improvement and Disparities (OHID).  There are updates to:   5 place of death indicators one indicator that describes the percentage of temporary care home residents who die in a care home   The palliative and end of life care profiles are presented in an interactive tool which aims to help local government and health services improve care at the end of life. "
